# oms-train — LLM Reference

Training scenario runner. Validates agent personas against structured scenarios and iterates until all pass. Feeds lessons back to agent lessons.md files on each run.

## Triggers — use /oms-train when

- New scenarios exist in agents/training/scenarios/ that haven't been run
- An agent persona was edited and needs re-validation
- Nightly training run (via oms-train-nightly.sh) when failing scenarios exist
- A real OMS failure was captured via /oms-capture and needs a guard scenario written

Skip /oms-train when:
- All scenarios already passing (check agents/training/results.tsv)
- No changes to personas or scenarios since last run

## Invocation

```
/oms-train                        # run all scenarios, loop until all green
/oms-train 001 002 003            # run specific scenarios by number
/oms-train --failing              # re-run only last-run failures
/oms-train --difficulty basic     # filter by difficulty (basic / medium / advanced)
```

## What it does

1. Reads scenario files from agents/training/scenarios/
2. Runs each scenario: injects the prompt, evaluates agent output against validation-criteria.md
3. On failure: rewrites the failing persona section to fix the gap, re-runs
4. Writes lessons to the relevant agent's lessons.md
5. Appends results to agents/training/results.tsv

## Key files

Read: agents/training/scenarios/*.md, agents/training/validation-criteria.md, agent personas
Write: agent lessons.md files, agents/training/results.tsv

## Related

- /oms-capture — turns a real OMS failure into a training scenario
- Nightly runner: ~/.claude/bin/oms-train-nightly.sh (runs --failing when new scenarios exist)
